# Support

Need help, have feedback, or want to share an idea?

* **Questions & Help** – Start a [Discussion](../../../discussions) to ask questions or get help.
* **Feedback** – Share your feedback in [Discussions](../../../discussions).
* **New Ideas** – Open an [Issue](../../../issues) or start a [Discussion](../../../discussions). Ideas may be moved to Discussions for further conversation.
* **Bug Reports** – [Open an Issue](../../../issues) with details about the problem.
* **Feature Requests** – [Open an Issue](../../../issues) or start a [Discussion](../../../discussions) to propose your idea.

Please use the appropriate channel so conversations and issues are easy to find and follow.
